description:
Register a new biometric attendance device in AttendHRM for the new branch office. Add a new device with the following configuration:

- Device Name: WS-FP-RECEPTION-01
- Branch: Westside Office
- Device Type: Fingerprint (or Biometric/ZKTeco)
- IP Address: 192.168.10.45
- Port: 4370
- Serial Number: ZK-TF20-2024-00871
- Communication Mode: TCP/IP
- Status: Active

Note: The 'Westside Office' branch has been pre-configured in the system.
